title: Expand the search function in the iOS app to other fields or columns across boards
excerpt: When searching in the iOS app (version 5.28.2) in a specific board (all leads) the search function is limited to the main field (name). It doesn’t search in other fields or columns. One should be able to search in all da…

posts.author: j.thijssen (Jeroen)
posts.cookedHtml: When searching in the iOS app (version 5.28.2) in a specific board (all leads) the search function is limited to the main field (name). It doesn’t search in other fields or columns. One should be able to search in all data fields.
